system.powerDescription:
Once per mission, you reach a fleeting peace of mind and body, a nirvana of optimized power output. You gain the following effects depending on the amount of sin you currently have for the rest of the scene, these effects stacks.

• Equal or higher than 6 sin; You regain 1 Psyche Burst at the start of the round if you have none.

• Equal or higher than 9 sin; When rolling PSYCHE, you may reroll it once, picking the second result as final.

• Equal or higher than 12 sin; Your Egoist powers gain up to +2 CAT in power, however you must give up if you go into sin overflow at the end of the scene.
